Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Jul-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for Donald Gouveia.

Ms. Fox stated that the sole asset is an inheritance in a New York probate that continues to be stymied for various reasons that she does not understand and that she can file a status report next week. Status on close of estate is continued to July 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for Donald Gouveia.

Ms. Fox stated that she will have a status report shortly, that the only asset is an inheritance from New York and that the New York Attorney promised to provide her with information, but he hasn't. Status on close of estate and filing of an ex parte application to increase bond is continued to September 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.
